name: part_002
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-pro-preview/part_002.webm

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal performs 'Deal with the devil' on a casino-themed stage with backup dancers.
MC section where Aki greets the audience, introduces the hashtag, and poses for screenshots.
Aki discovers and interacts with a roulette wheel on stage.

subtitles.original: キミ吊って甘い罠
subtitles.english: I'll lure you in with a sweet trap,

subtitles.original: 仕掛けて罠にハメるわ
subtitles.english: set it up and catch you in it.

subtitles.original: 油断誘うのよ
subtitles.english: I'll invite your negligence.

subtitles.original: 仕込まれた TRAP & CHEAT
subtitles.english: A set-up TRAP & CHEAT.

subtitles.original: 何も知らないような顔で
subtitles.english: With a face that knows nothing,

subtitles.original: 落とすわ アナタを
subtitles.english: I will take you down.

subtitles.original: 聞かせて それ優等生？
subtitles.english: Tell me, is that an honor student?

subtitles.original: 夢見てるんでしょ？
subtitles.english: You're dreaming, aren't you?

subtitles.original: で どうやったって変更は効かない
subtitles.english: So, no matter what you do, changes won't work.

subtitles.original: どんな小さなズルだって
subtitles.english: No matter how small the cheat,

subtitles.original: 私の目は誤魔化されないわ
subtitles.english: my eyes won't be deceived.

subtitles.original: 自惚れた開いた口塞ぐ
subtitles.english: I'll shut your conceited, gaping mouth.

subtitles.original: カッコつけるのはウンザリ
subtitles.english: I'm sick of you acting cool.

subtitles.original: 粛清してあげる
subtitles.english: I'll purge you.

subtitles.original: 狙った獲物は逃さない
subtitles.english: I won't let my targeted prey escape.

subtitles.original: 唇 濡らして頂くわ 愛で
subtitles.english: I'll wet my lips and partake, with love.

subtitles.original: ダイヤのジャックで手が揃うわ
subtitles.english: With the Jack of Diamonds, my hand is complete.

subtitles.original: 笑みは凍り 始末だけ
subtitles.english: The smile freezes, only disposal remains.

subtitles.original: 私のポーカーフェイスは It's perfect
subtitles.english: My poker face is It's perfect.

subtitles.original: 一部の隙も見せたりしないわ
subtitles.english: I won't show even a fraction of a gap.

subtitles.original: 視線 感じてるわ
subtitles.english: I feel your gaze.

subtitles.original: お望み通りの最後マデ
subtitles.english: Until the very end you wished for.

subtitles.original: 見てばかり居ないで
subtitles.english: Don't just stand there watching,

subtitles.original: あたしが教えてイクから
subtitles.english: I will teach you myself.

subtitles.original: 負けるのが怖いの？
subtitles.english: Are you afraid of losing?

subtitles.original: いい気・減
subtitles.english: How pathetic.

subtitles.original: 夢見てるんでしょ？
subtitles.english: You're dreaming, aren't you?

subtitles.original: で どうやったって変更は効かない
subtitles.english: So, no matter what you do, changes won't work.

subtitles.original: あたしのモノにする
subtitles.english: I'll make you mine.

subtitles.original: あなたの髪の一本まで全部
subtitles.english: Every single strand of your hair, all of it.

subtitles.original: 自惚れた開いた口には
subtitles.english: Into that conceited, gaping mouth,

subtitles.original: 恐怖を与えてあげるわ
subtitles.english: I will feed you fear.

subtitles.original: 底までイクわ
subtitles.english: I'll go to the very bottom.

subtitles.original: で どうやったって
subtitles.english: So, no matter what you do,

subtitles.original: 躊躇わない スリル
subtitles.english: I won't hesitate, thrill.

subtitles.original: 誰にも触らせない
subtitles.english: I won't let anyone touch,

subtitles.original: この Money!
subtitles.english: this Money!

subtitles.original: ダイヤのジャックで手が揃うわ
subtitles.english: With the Jack of Diamonds, my hand is complete.

subtitles.original: 覚悟決めて
subtitles.english: Prepare yourself,

subtitles.original: ハイになるまで打って
subtitles.english: bet until you get high.

subtitles.original: 震える指じゃ もてあそべないわ
subtitles.english: You can't play with trembling fingers.

subtitles.original: 誰にも負けない感じさせて
subtitles.english: Make me feel like I won't lose to anyone.

subtitles.original: Love me!
subtitles.english: Love me!

subtitles.original: はっ…あれ？椅子…なくなっちゃった。
subtitles.english: Huh? Oh? The chair... is gone.

subtitles.original: あぁ…もう少し座らせて欲しかった。
subtitles.english: Ah... I wanted to sit a little longer.

subtitles.original: はーい みんな！見えてる？聞こえてる？
subtitles.english: Hi everyone! Can you see me? Can you hear me?

subtitles.original: ホロライブ所属の癒し系ハーフエルフ、アキロゼことアキ・ローゼンタールです。
subtitles.english: I'm Hololive's healing-type Half-Elf, AkiRose also known as Aki Rosenthal.

subtitles.original: ハロハロハロー！
subtitles.english: Hello hello hello!

subtitles.original: アローナ！
subtitles.english: Alona!

subtitles.original: はー えー 今回の…アキロゼ生誕祭2026へようこそ！
subtitles.english: Haa, um, welcome to... AkiRose Birthday Celebration 2026!

subtitles.original: 早速ね、なんか色々行われていたんですが…
subtitles.english: Something was already going on right away, but...

subtitles.original: 一体今回のライブはどうなっちゃうのか
subtitles.english: what is going to happen in this concert exactly?

subtitles.original: 是非最後まで、必見…お見逃しなくお願いします。
subtitles.english: Please, it's a must-watch until the end... don't miss it.

subtitles.original: 今回のライブのハッシュタグは #アキロゼ生誕祭2026
subtitles.english: The hashtag for this concert is #AkiRoseBirthday2026

subtitles.original: こちらを付けてXに沢山ポストしてね。
subtitles.english: Please add this and post a lot on X.

subtitles.original: 勿論 可愛いスクショ…
subtitles.english: Of course, lots of cute screenshots...

subtitles.original: えーのも沢山撮って
subtitles.english: take lots of nice ones too,

subtitles.original: 合わせて投稿して下さい。
subtitles.english: and please post them together.

subtitles.original: ライブが終わったらアキロゼ見に行きます…見てね。
subtitles.english: AkiRose will go look at them after the live ends... so watch me.

subtitles.original: あ、チャンネル登録もよろしくね。
subtitles.english: Ah, please subscribe to the channel too.

subtitles.original: OK？
subtitles.english: Ok?

subtitles.original: はいありがとう。
subtitles.english: Yes, thank you.

subtitles.original: ん？何だ？何何何？
subtitles.english: Hm? What is it? What what what?

subtitles.original: ていうか、ここ何処なんだろう…
subtitles.english: I mean, where is this place...

subtitles.original: ん？お？あんなとこにルーレットがある。
subtitles.english: Hm? Oh? There's a roulette over there.

subtitles.original: え？回るのかな？
subtitles.english: Eh? Does it spin?

subtitles.original: 回った！えーすごい！おー回った…
subtitles.english: It spun! Eh, amazing! Oh, it spun...
